title: pterisanthes heterantha
intro: Pterisanthes heterantha is a shrub native to the Himalayan region, belonging to the family Vitaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese and Ayurvedic medicine. The leaves and stems of Pterisanthes heterantha are rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Pterisanthes heterantha, including infusions and extracts, are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, respiratory issues, and skin problems.
